schema_creates: profiles for admin and artist roles
changes: Added editable Track Library rows for all six public preview songs.
Added Edit / Re-upload modal for replacing any preview MP3.
Updated public player hydration to read all six published Supabase track audio URLs, not only Jmapelle_Hushpuppi.
Added track_key and cover_url fields to the Supabase schema for stable preview slots.
Added SUPABASE_TRACK_LIBRARY_EDIT_HOTFIX.sql for existing Supabase projects.
Kept RLS-safe upload paths under authenticated user UID folders.
Added fallback-safe public music player for broken/private Supabase audio URLs.
Added hyphenated Jmapelle_Hushpuppi preview asset path for dashboard/upload consistency.
Added optional SQL cleanup for broken Jmapelle preview rows.
Added advanced Google SEO meta tags for public pages.
Added canonical URLs, robots/googlebot directives and Google Search Console verification placeholder.
Added Organization, WebSite, WebPage, MusicGroup and release ItemList JSON-LD structured data.
Added Open Graph and X/Twitter summary_large_image meta tags with a branded Nebula Records preview image.
Created assets/social-preview-nebula-records.png and assets/nebula-records-icon-512.png for social previews and app icons.
Added X.com icon and handle for Nebula Records: @nebulamusic_rh.
Optimized footer into a cleaner compact music-label footer with social icon links and EKOUNLOCKED lockup.
Updated sitemap.xml with lastmod, priorities and public page coverage.
validated: schema includes required tables, ensure_profile(), and RLS policies
JSON-LD parse validation across public pages

v12_css_reference_upgrade.summary: Applied uploaded CSS design-system concepts to Nebula Records site: typography, HSL tokens, readable dark surfaces, focus rings, mobile refinements, footer/header polish.
